Issues: Clutter in the Foreground: The placement of multiple chairs and tables in the immediate foreground, while adding scale, slightly overcomplicates the composition and distracts from the main depth of field.
Washed-Out Edges: Some washes and edges, particularly in the background buildings, could be crisper to prevent the piece from looking muddy or overly diffuse upon enlargement.

The subject matter is very common: European street scenes (especially Parisian cafes) are a highly saturated market. While charming, this lack of conceptual originality might limit its ability to stand out against similar pieces.
